title: StarOcean's Better Kobold Tools
description: Retextured kobold iron tools from the Kobolds! mod
body:
# ⛏️Description
This resourcepack retextured the kobold iron tools from the [Kobold](https://modrinth.com/mod/kobolds) mod.
